title: Read CLI status from Visibility

proposal.approval_evidence: User approved the architectural direction via question tool: "Persist summaries to Temporal memo/search-attrs (Recommended)". Refined to Visibility search-attribute read (attributes already upserted by change workflows; no memo write needed).

discovery.approval_evidence: Agreement persisted; contract minted (17 items). Direction user-approved via question tool. Visibility search attributes verified populated for inactive change (hardenMigrationSafety: AdvCurrentGate=release, AdvChangeTitle present).

design.approval_evidence: Design recorded. Approach validated against live Temporal: search attributes confirmed populated for inactive change. No workflow/worker change needed; CLI read path only. Self-validated (low architectural risk, single read-path swap reusing existing upserted attributes).

items.text: `adv status --json` for a project with non-archived change workflows but no open session returns `source:"temporal"`, `live:true`, and one active row per non-terminal change built from Visibility search attributes.

Each row's `id`, `title`, `status`, `gateProgressStr`, `firstIncompleteGate`, and `lastActivityAt` are derived from `AdvChangeId`, `AdvChangeTitle`, `AdvChangeStatus`, `AdvCurrentGate`, `AdvLastSignalAt`/`AdvCreatedAt`.
Terminal-complete changes (`AdvCurrentGate` resolves to all gates done) are excluded from active rows (`firstIncompleteGate` null).
When the Temporal connection or Visibility list fails, `adv status --json` returns `live:false` fail-closed with remediation and zero rows; no disk-projected active rows.
`adv status` no longer issues a per-change `getState` workflow query for the default status table.
`warp-project-launcher --adv-changes <project>` renders active ADV rows for an inactive project (e.g. `/home/jon/dev/pokeedge`).
No CLI mutation subcommands are added; CLI remains read-only.
`advance-meta` spec and tests document the Visibility-search-attribute status read.
Reuse canonical `GATE_ORDER` from `bin/lib/changes.ts` for gate synthesis.
Keep change-workflow and worker code unchanged (search attributes are already upserted); no worker/dist rebuild required for the CLI read path.
Do not parse human `adv status --no-color` output.
Do not render stale disk-projected active changes as current rows.
Do not reintroduce a per-project-worker dependency for the default status table.
Do not weaken fail-closed behavior when Temporal is unavailable.
Do not change the MCP `adv_status` tool internal path in this change.

rows.evidence: summariesFromVisibility builds rows from AdvChangeId/Title/Status/CurrentGate/LastSignalAt/CreatedAt; loadLiveSummaries connects + calls it; bin/adv runStatus uses loadLiveSummaries. Tests: live-status.test.ts L141-161 (summary from attrs), L255-277 (payload from summaries).

buildSummaryFromSearchAttributes maps AdvChangeId→id, AdvChangeTitle→title, AdvChangeStatus→status, gatesFromCurrentGate→gateProgressStr/firstIncompleteGate, AdvLastSignalAt/AdvCreatedAt→lastActivityAt. Tests: L141-161, L178-193, L195-207.
buildSummaryFromSearchAttributes returns null when AdvCurrentGate='done'; summariesFromVisibility drops nulls. Tests: L163-176 (terminal excluded), L209-244 (doneChange dropped from results).

summariesFromVisibility throws on list failure → caller catches → buildLiveStatusFailure returns live:false with remediation. Tests: L246-253 (visibility failure propagates). bin/adv L126-134 catches and emits failure.
bin/adv runStatus no longer imports or calls listLiveChangeStates/loadLiveStatus. Uses loadLiveSummaries instead. cli-bridge-contract.test.ts asserts no getState query in new read path.
loadLiveSummaries is worker-free (Visibility search attributes only). warp-project-launcher calls adv status --json which uses loadLiveSummaries. No per-project worker dependency.
bin/adv runStatus only reads; no mutation subcommands added. Help text lists only status and roadmap (both read-only).
.adv/specs/advance-meta/spec.json includes rq-visibilityStatusRead01. docs/specs/advance-meta.md updated. cli-bridge-contract.test.ts updated.
Source files edited in repo worktree; deploy via scripts/deploy-local.sh --fix.
bin/adv remains read-only; no mutation authority added.
gatesFromCurrentGate in live-status.ts imports and uses GATE_ORDER from bin/lib/changes.ts.
No changes to plugin/src/temporal/workflows.ts, worker code, or dist. Only bin/ read path changed.
No --no-color output parsing. loadLiveSummaries returns structured ChangeSummary objects.
Active rows built exclusively from live Visibility search attributes; no disk-projected active changes.
New path uses client.workflow.list (Visibility) with no per-project worker. Old query path still exists but not called by default status.
Temporal failure → throw → buildLiveStatusFailure (live:false, zero rows). No weakening.
No changes to plugin/src/tools/status.ts or MCP adv_status tool.

documents.proposal:
## Cross-Project Origin

This change was created as a follow-up from **toolbox**.

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Source project | toolbox |
| Source path | `/home/jon/toolbox` |

> **Note:** The originating project should be consulted for context on why this change is needed.


# Proposal: Read CLI status from Visibility search attributes

## Problem

`adv status` per-workflow query path requires a live worker for the selected project. Browsing projects from the launcher (no session) → query timeout → fail-closed → no ADV rows. Confirmed with ~/dev/pokeedge: `adv status --json` returns `live:false`, error `Temporal query hardenMigrationSafety timed out after 5000ms`, while the change workflows are Running and their Visibility search attributes are fully populated.

## Proposal

Replace the CLI live-status read with a Visibility-search-attribute read:

- Enumerate the project's change workflows via `client.workflow.list` (already used by `listChangeWorkflowIds`).
- Build each `ChangeSummary` from the workflow's Visibility search attributes (`AdvChangeId`, `AdvChangeTitle`, `AdvChangeStatus`, `AdvCurrentGate`, `AdvLastSignalAt`, `AdvCreatedAt`), synthesizing `gateProgressStr`/`firstIncompleteGate` from `AdvCurrentGate` and the canonical `GATE_ORDER`.
- Keep `source:"temporal"`, `live:true` on success; fail closed (`live:false`) only when the Temporal connection or Visibility list fails.
- No per-workflow query → no per-project worker dependency.

## Scope

- `bin/lib/live-status.ts` — new Visibility-summary read path; CLI uses it.
- `bin/adv` — `runStatus` consumes the new path.
- Tests — CLI bridge contract + new live-status unit coverage.
- Spec/docs — note the worker-free Visibility read in advance-meta.

## Success criteria

- `adv status --json` for a project with no open session returns `live:true` with active change rows built from Visibility.
- `warp-project-launcher --adv-changes <project>` renders ADV rows for inactive projects (pokeedge).
- Temporal down still fails closed (`live:false`, no disk active rows).
- No new CLI mutation authority.

## Out of scope

- Task counts in rows (search attributes do not carry counts; default 0/0 acceptable, follow-up may enrich).
- MCP `adv_status` tool internal path.
documents.problemStatement:
The `adv status` CLI reads active-change state by querying each change workflow (`CHANGE_WORKFLOW_QUERY_NAMES.getState`). A Temporal workflow query is only answered by a worker polling that project's task queue. The ADV worker is started per OpenCode session/project, so a project with no open session has no worker, the query times out after 5s, the CLI returns `live:false`, and the launcher (correctly fail-closed per rq-statusCliBridge01) shows only the plain row. Result: `warp-project-launcher` shows no ADV changes for any project that does not currently have an open ADV session (e.g. ~/dev/pokeedge), even though its change workflows are Running in Temporal.

Change workflows already upsert rich Visibility search attributes on every signal: AdvChangeId, AdvChangeTitle, AdvChangeStatus, AdvCurrentGate, AdvLastSignalAt, AdvCreatedAt, AdvAffectedProjects. These are server-side Temporal Visibility data, readable without a worker. The CLI should build active-change rows from Visibility search attributes instead of per-workflow queries, keeping the read live-Temporal-backed and fail-closed when Temporal/Visibility is unavailable, while removing the dependency on a live per-project worker.
documents.agreement:
# Agreement

## Objectives

1. Make `adv status` read active-change rows from Temporal Visibility search attributes so it works without a live per-project worker.
2. Restore ADV change rows in `warp-project-launcher` for projects with no open session.
3. Preserve live-Temporal-backed, fail-closed semantics (no stale disk active rows).

## Acceptance Criteria

1. `adv status --json` for a project with non-archived change workflows but no open session returns `source:"temporal"`, `live:true`, and one active row per non-terminal change built from Visibility search attributes.
2. Each row's `id`, `title`, `status`, `gateProgressStr`, `firstIncompleteGate`, and `lastActivityAt` are derived from `AdvChangeId`, `AdvChangeTitle`, `AdvChangeStatus`, `AdvCurrentGate`, `AdvLastSignalAt`/`AdvCreatedAt`.
3. Terminal-complete changes (`AdvCurrentGate` resolves to all gates done) are excluded from active rows (`firstIncompleteGate` null).
4. When the Temporal connection or Visibility list fails, `adv status --json` returns `live:false` fail-closed with remediation and zero rows; no disk-projected active rows.
5. `adv status` no longer issues a per-change `getState` workflow query for the default status table.
6. `warp-project-launcher --adv-changes <project>` renders active ADV rows for an inactive project (e.g. `/home/jon/dev/pokeedge`).
7. No CLI mutation subcommands are added; CLI remains read-only.
8. `advance-meta` spec and tests document the Visibility-search-attribute status read.

## Constraints

- Edit source-of-truth files; deploy via `scripts/deploy-local.sh --fix`.
- Keep `bin/adv` read-only; no mutation authority.
- Reuse canonical `GATE_ORDER` from `bin/lib/changes.ts` for gate synthesis.
- Keep change-workflow and worker code unchanged (search attributes are already upserted); no worker/dist rebuild required for the CLI read path.
- Do not parse human `adv status --no-color` output.

## Avoidances

- Do not render stale disk-projected active changes as current rows.
- Do not reintroduce a per-project-worker dependency for the default status table.
- Do not weaken fail-closed behavior when Temporal is unavailable.
- Do not change the MCP `adv_status` tool internal path in this change.

## Preview Applicability

visual_surface: false

Rationale: terminal CLI/launcher output only; covered by unit + integration verification, not browser UI.

## Decisions

### User Decisions

1. Direction approved via question tool: persist/read summaries from Temporal memo/search-attributes (worker-free), not disk fallback and not transient-worker spin.

### Agent Decisions (LBP)

1. Use existing upserted Visibility search attributes (no memo write needed) — change workflows already populate AdvCurrentGate/Title/Status/LastSignalAt.
2. Synthesize gate progress from AdvCurrentGate + GATE_ORDER.
3. Default task counts to 0/0 in worker-free rows (search attributes carry no counts); enrichment is an optional follow-up.

## Deferred Questions

None.

## Sign-Off

Direction approved by user via question tool selection (option A).
documents.design:
# Design

## Architecture

`adv status` default table currently calls `loadLiveStatus` → `listLiveChangeStates`, which enumerates change workflow IDs via Visibility and then issues a `getState` **workflow query** per change. Workflow queries require a worker polling the project task queue (`advance-<projectId>`); inactive projects have no worker → timeout → fail closed.

Change workflows already upsert Visibility **search attributes** on every signal (`buildChangeSearchAttributes` in `plugin/src/temporal/search-attributes.ts`):
`AdvChangeId`, `AdvChangeTitle`, `AdvChangeStatus`, `AdvCurrentGate`, `AdvLastSignalAt`, `AdvCreatedAt`, `AdvAffectedProjects`, worktree attrs.

These are server-side Visibility data, returned by `client.workflow.list` results without any worker. The CLI will build status rows directly from search attributes.

## Key Decisions

### KD1 — Read summaries from Visibility search attributes
`bin/lib/live-status.ts` adds `loadLiveSummaries(projectId, timeoutMs, now)`:
- connect via `createTemporalClientBundle`
- iterate `client.workflow.list({ query: buildVisibilityQuery({ projectId }) })`
- filter to `adv/change/<projectId>/` prefix
- map each execution's search attributes → `ChangeSummary`

No `getState` query. Worker-free.

### KD2 — Synthesize gate progress from AdvCurrentGate
`AdvCurrentGate` is the first non-done gate, or "done" when all complete. Build a gates map over canonical `GATE_ORDER` (`bin/lib/changes.ts`): gates before currentGate = done, currentGate and after = pending; if "done", all done. Reuse `buildGateProgress`/`firstIncompleteGate`. Terminal-complete (`firstIncompleteGate` null) rows are dropped by the launcher and excluded from active rows here too.

### KD3 — Preserve fail-closed
Connection or list failure → `buildLiveStatusFailure` (`live:false`, remediation, zero rows). No disk active fallback. Temporal-down still fails closed.

### KD4 — Search-attribute decoding is defensive
Values arrive as arrays; Datetime may be `Date` or ISO string. A small reader normalizes: first element; `Date` → `toISOString`; missing → undefined. Unknown/blank title falls back to changeId.

### KD5 — Task counts default 0/0
Search attributes carry no task counts. `tasksDone/tasksTotal = 0`. Launcher rows do not display counts; human table shows `0/0`. Optional future enrichment (query when a worker is available) is out of scope.

### KD6 — Keep workflow/worker code unchanged
Search attributes are already upserted; no workflow, worker, or dist rebuild needed for the CLI read path. `scripts/deploy-local.sh --fix` syncs `bin/` and `plugin/src` so the deployed `adv` picks up the new TS read path.

## Implementation Plan

1. `bin/lib/live-status.ts`
   - Add `VisibilityListClient` interface yielding `{ workflowId, searchAttributes }`.
   - Add `buildSummaryFromSearchAttributes(changeId, attrs, now)`.
   - Add `summariesFromVisibility(client, { projectId, timeoutMs, now })`.
   - Add `loadLiveSummaries(projectId, timeoutMs, now)`.
   - Keep `buildLiveStatusFailure`; add `buildLiveStatusPayloadFromSummaries(summaries, options)`.
2. `bin/adv`
   - `runStatus` uses `loadLiveSummaries` + payload-from-summaries; keep terminal-count enrichment (archived/closed) best-effort.
3. Tests
   - `bin/lib/live-status.test.ts` (or extend): search-attribute mapping, gate synthesis, terminal exclusion, fail-closed.
   - Update `plugin/src/cli-bridge-contract.test.ts` "status live client uses canonical getState query name" → assert Visibility search-attribute read path (no getState query; uses buildVisibilityQuery + AdvCurrentGate) while keeping no-mutation and no-disk-active-rows assertions.
4. Spec/docs
   - Extend `advance-meta` `rq-statusCliBridge01` body or add a sub-requirement noting Visibility-search-attribute worker-free read; mirror in `docs/specs/advance-meta.md`.
5. Deploy + verify
   - `scripts/deploy-local.sh --fix`; verify pokeedge `adv status --json` live + launcher rows.

## Test Strategy

- RED: unit test asserts a fake Visibility execution with `AdvCurrentGate=release` maps to a row with `gateProgressStr` `✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ○` and `firstIncompleteGate=release`; current code (query path) does not produce this.
- GREEN: implement; unit tests pass.
- Integration: live `adv status --json` from `/home/jon/dev/pokeedge` returns `live:true` with `hardenMigrationSafety` row; launcher `--adv-changes /home/jon/dev/pokeedge` shows ADV rows.
- Fail-closed: with `ADV_TEMPORAL_ADDRESS=127.0.0.1:1`, `adv status --json` returns `live:false`, zero rows.

## Rollback / Failure Handling

- Any list/connection error → fail closed (existing failure builder).
- Search-attribute missing fields → skip row or fall back (changeId as title, proposal as first gate) without crashing.

## Out of Scope

- MCP `adv_status` tool path.
- Task-count enrichment.
- Workflow/worker/dist changes.
documents.executiveSummary:
# Executive Summary

## Outcome
`adv status` now reads active-change rows from Temporal Visibility search attributes — worker-free. Projects with no open ADV session show live rows via `warp-project-launcher`. Fail-closed semantics preserved.

## Verdict
APPROVED

## What Was Built
1. `bin/lib/live-status.ts` — new Visibility-summary read path: `summariesFromVisibility`, `buildSummaryFromSearchAttributes`, `loadLiveSummaries`, `buildLiveStatusPayloadFromSummaries`. No per-change `getState` workflow queries.
2. `bin/adv` — `runStatus` uses `loadLiveSummaries` instead of `loadLiveStatus`/`listLiveChangeStates`.
3. `bin/lib/live-status.test.ts` — 12 tests covering search-attribute decoding, gate synthesis, terminal exclusion, fail-closed, sparse-attr fallback.
4. `plugin/src/cli-bridge-contract.test.ts` — updated contract test asserting Visibility read path (no getState query).
5. `.adv/specs/advance-meta/spec.json` + `docs/specs/advance-meta.md` — `rq-visibilityStatusRead01` spec law.

## What Was Verified
- Verdict: contract review matrix 17/17 passed/respected; 0 failures.
- Tests: 12 bun tests pass (live-status); 262 plugin test files pass (3545 tests); `pnpm run check` clean.
- No workflow/worker/dist changes required — CLI read path only.

## Remaining Concerns
None.
